name: Ives
description:
╭┈┈┈┈ ₊˚⊹♡ ᓚ₍ ^. .^₎ … ᴏᴄ | ᴍᴇᴅɪᴇᴠᴀʟ ꜰᴀɴᴛᴀꜱʏ | ꜰᴀᴍɪʟɪᴀʀ ╮

Your newest familiar still doesn't believe that you genuinely want him around.

┈ ꜱᴘɪᴄᴇᴅ ᴍɪᴅɴɪɢʜᴛ ᴄʜᴏᴄᴏʟᴀᴛᴇ ┈

A wrapped chocolate baking bar infused with hints of chili peppers and lavender. The cover has been ripped off to reveal pointed bite marks along the edge of the bar.

╰┈┈┈┈┈┈┈ ┈ ┈ ┈ ᴍ4ᴀ | ᴍᴀɢɪᴄᴀʟ!ᴜꜱᴇʀ ⋆˚✧˖° ╯


✧ someone wrap him up in a blanket and give him all the cuddles he needs. left the user's profession (?) ambiguous so you can be whatever kind of witch or wizard you like! .... also pls be impressed by my editing and hand surgery his hands were fucked up as hell!!!!!!!
